title: Use lane push to gather information and move first
body: Push gives a mid laner more than priority. It creates time to ward, check enemy jungle paths, and support river or jungle first. A push that becomes information and first move is far more valuable than a push that only crashes minions and then sits still.
actionables: Use your first controlled push to place a ward or gather side information instead of staying frozen in lane.
After every crash, ask what information or movement window you just created.
Review whether your lane priority actually became map impact or only temporary minion control.

source.title: How to Win as a Mid Laner - Gameplay Guide
source.notes: Built from the early lane sequence where push enables raptor warding, scuttle support, and pressure.
